Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PES-14-297812 The Estate of Robert Williams.

Appearances: Peter Shelton in Propria Persona.

The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with full authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
